chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1155 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.9554/2022 3. For hearing of CMA No.9555/2022 4. For hearing of CMA No.5188/2022 5. For hearing of CMA No.5189/2022 6. For hearing of main case 31.01.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for the petitioner Messrs. Ghulam Asghar Pathan and Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocates for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner states that notices have been impugned herein inter alia on the ground that the material required to provide replies was seized by the respondent department and not available therewith. Learned counsel submits that the petitioner is ready and willing to submit to the jurisdiction of the issuing authority and respond to the said notices, provided that the relevant record / copies thereof are available therewith. Learned counsel for the respondent department states that the petitioner is at liberty to obtain copy of the said record (electronic or otherwise) and in such regard several letters have also been issued thereto. By consent, it is sought that the petitioner shall approach to the respondent department on 06.02.2025 at 10:30 AM to obtain the record. The petitioner shall be at liberty to bring along any computer technician relevant for obtaining copy of the electronic record. Since the matter is only with respect to the notices, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner shall respond thereto before the issuing authority, which may adjudicate the same, after providing opportunity of obtaining the information as aforesaid and opportunity of personal hearing.

The petitioner shall be at liberty to bring along any computer technician relevant for obtaining copy of the electronic record. Since the matter is only with respect to the notices, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner shall respond thereto before the issuing authority, which may adjudicate the same, after providing opportunity of obtaining the information as aforesaid and opportunity of personal hearing. It is further sought that pending the determination of the notices no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the department has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
